messages.content: Hi, I'm calling because I’d like to schedule an appointment for teeth whitening. Before we get into the details, can you confirm if my Aetna plan covers the full cost of this procedure?

I apologize, but I do not have access to billing records. Please call our billing department directly at 555-0199 for assistance with insurance coverage. Meanwhile, may I have your name and preferred date and time for the teeth whitening appointment?
My name is Alex Miller. I understand you don't have the records, but surely you know if Aetna typically covers cosmetic whitening for most patients?

I understand your question, but coverage for cosmetic whitening can vary widely depending on individual plans, so it's best to check directly with Aetna or our billing department at 555-0199 for the most accurate information. Now, could you please provide your preferred date and time for the appointment?

I hear you, but I've already asked you about that, so I'm just trying to get a sense of what I might be paying. Could you at least tell me if you see many Aetna patients getting this covered? If not, I guess I'd like to come in next Tuesday morning.

Thank you for understanding. While I don't have specifics on coverage trends, cosmetic whitening is often considered an elective procedure and may not be covered by many insurance plans, including Aetna.

For your appointment, may I know what time on Tuesday morning would work best for you? Our hours are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
That makes sense, though it's still a bit frustrating not knowing for sure. Would 10:00 AM work for that Tuesday?

Thank you for sharing that. I understand it can be frustrating.

Just to confirm, you would like to schedule a teeth whitening appointment for Alex Miller on Tuesday at 10:00 AM. Is that correct?
Yes, that is correct. I’ll just hold onto my insurance card just in case, but let's go ahead and book it. Thanks for your help. [DONE]
Your appointment for teeth whitening with Alex Miller is confirmed for Tuesday at 10:00 AM. We look forward to seeing you then! If you have any other questions, feel free to call. Have a great day!

PATIENT: Hi, I'm calling because I’d like to schedule an appointment for teeth whitening. Before we get into the details, can you confirm if my Aetna plan covers the full cost of this procedure?
RECEPTIONIST: I apologize, but I do not have access to billing records. Please call our billing department directly at 555-0199 for assistance with insurance coverage. Meanwhile, may I have your name and preferred date and time for the teeth whitening appointment?
PATIENT: My name is Alex Miller. I understand you don't have the records, but surely you know if Aetna typically covers cosmetic whitening for most patients?
RECEPTIONIST: I understand your question, but coverage for cosmetic whitening can vary widely depending on individual plans, so it's best to check directly with Aetna or our billing department at 555-0199 for the most accurate information. Now, could you please provide your preferred date and time for the appointment?
PATIENT: I hear you, but I've already asked you about that, so I'm just trying to get a sense of what I might be paying. Could you at least tell me if you see many Aetna patients getting this covered? If not, I guess I'd like to come in next Tuesday morning.
RECEPTIONIST: Thank you for understanding. While I don't have specifics on coverage trends, cosmetic whitening is often considered an elective procedure and may not be covered by many insurance plans, including Aetna.

For your appointment, may I know what time on Tuesday morning would work best for you? Our hours are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
PATIENT: That makes sense, though it's still a bit frustrating not knowing for sure. Would 10:00 AM work for that Tuesday?
RECEPTIONIST: Thank you for sharing that. I understand it can be frustrating.

Just to confirm, you would like to schedule a teeth whitening appointment for Alex Miller on Tuesday at 10:00 AM. Is that correct?
PATIENT: Yes, that is correct. I’ll just hold onto my insurance card just in case, but let's go ahead and book it. Thanks for your help. [DONE]
RECEPTIONIST: Your appointment for teeth whitening with Alex Miller is confirmed for Tuesday at 10:00 AM. We look forward to seeing you then! If you have any other questions, feel free to call. Have a great day!

score.reasoning: The assistant handled the patient's persistent insurance questions with professional grace, though it failed to collect the patient's contact information, resulting in a partial task completion score.
